_doc: Operator updates this weekly (Sunday night) to set the next firing batch. Studios fires the kiln once a week, on Mondays. Public consumption: the home page reads this file and shows scarcity messaging next to the Lab WhatsApp CTA. Schema is intentionally tiny so the operator can edit it from a phone.

_doc_fields.next_firing: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) of the next firing day. Always a Monday. Lima local.
_doc_fields.total_slots: How many pieces fit in this week's batch. Usually 6. Capacity-bound.
_doc_fields.reserved: How many slots are already taken by paying clients. When reserved >= total, the UI rolls forward to the following Monday.
_doc_fields.cutoff_offset_days: Days BEFORE next_firing after which we stop accepting new orders for this batch (1 = Sunday cutoff for Monday firing).
